final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style lifestyle photo of a Korean café scene featuring specialty coffee and dessert, shot on smartphone.

Style/medium: smartphone photography with hand-drawn annotation overlay, Instagram story aesthetic, casual lifestyle editorial, journal-style sketch marks in white thin lines
Composition: top-down flat lay or 45-degree angle, shallow depth of field, coffee cup and dessert as hero objects on marble or wood table
Subject: latte art coffee in ceramic cup, Korean-style dessert (possibly bingsu or pastry), minimal table setting with spoon and napkin
Scene/backdrop: bright Korean café interior with soft bokeh, clean minimal aesthetic, no people
Lighting/mood: natural daylight from window, soft and airy, warm and inviting atmosphere
Color palette: warm browns from coffee, creamy whites, soft pastels from dessert, natural wood tones
Materials/textures: ceramic glaze, frothy milk foam, dessert texture, paper or fabric napkin
Text (verbatim): "清爽" "温柔的甜味" "湿润" "最高" "放松" "美好时光" "幸福过头了～"
Annotations: white thin sketch lines outlining objects, single-stroke rough uneven style, arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance, Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), short diary-style comments, steam wisps, sparkles, small hearts and emoji decorations, intentional white space, magazine rough note aesthetic
Constraints: annotations must feel hand-drawn not digital, text must be Japanese script as specified, maintain fashionable yet relaxed vibe
Avoid: heavy digital filters, cluttered composition, realistic 3D rendered annotations, English text, over-decoration without breathing room
